name: Jon's Jigsaw Puzzle
short_description: Classic ribbon-cut jigsaw puzzle game play with original nature photography and animated puzzles. User-extendable means you can create your own puzzles instead of buying more.
detailed_description:
Classic ribbon-cut jigsaw puzzle game play with over 50 included puzzles.

Puzzles feature original high-resolution nature photography and several animated puzzles.

Supports user-generated puzzle packs for continued enjoyment. (For Free, instead of expensive DLC!)

Is that 10,000 piece puzzle taking too long to finish? Save your progress and finish later.

Want to stretch your laptop's battery life while playing? Disable the background animation and music to extend your game time.
